meta.title: History | Jabugo Bodega
meta.description: Editorial story of Jabugo Bodega in Granada: traditional abaceria philosophy, human scale, and personalized hospitality.

sections.title: Abaceria philosophy
paragraphs: Jabugo Bodega, led by Nicolás and his wife, brings traditional abaceria philosophy into central Granada.
Here, Iberian product knowledge and service standards are treated as one.

quote.text: The project narrative should feel like an invitation into an Iberian house.
quote.author: Nicolás

image.alt: Bodega interior with a warm atmosphere

sections.title: The host’s role
paragraphs: Nicolás appears in the research as an exceptional and professional host.
Customers and critics point to personalized service as a key pillar of the venue’s success.

quote.text: The website should not sound corporate, but close and personal.
quote.author: Nicolás
